author: Nguyen Van Duy
description: Imperial Automation umbrella cog. This phase implements filtered RSS feeds, daily gossip digests, Red Audio channel controls, queue quotas, a persistent Now Playing panel, and private listening rooms.
install_msg: Load with [p]load imperialautomation. Configure channels through [p]ia. This package requires feedparser and integrates with Red's Audio, Permissions, and the optional BotOps cog.
